rows.label: Supabase auth + REST
rows.action: Set Supabase project URL and anon key before claiming cross-device account sync.

rows.label: Supabase auth + REST
rows.action: Set Supabase project URL and anon key before claiming cross-device account sync.

rows.label: OAuth redirect
rows.action: Set VITE_SUPABASE_REDIRECT_URL to the same deployed HTTPS app URL used by VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL for Google OAuth and magic links.

rows.label: Free schedule source
rows.detail: TheSportsDB free route is available for schedule, score, event status and limited lineup/stat enrichment continuity
rows.action: Keep VITE_THESPORTSDB_LEAGUE_ID, VITE_THESPORTSDB_SEASON and VITE_THESPORTSDB_ENRICHMENT_LIMIT aligned with the tournament.

rows.label: Free schedule source
rows.detail: TheSportsDB free route is available for schedule, score, event status and limited lineup/stat enrichment continuity
rows.action: Keep VITE_THESPORTSDB_LEAGUE_ID, VITE_THESPORTSDB_SEASON and VITE_THESPORTSDB_ENRICHMENT_LIMIT aligned with the tournament.

rows.label: Free schedule source
rows.detail: TheSportsDB free route is available for schedule, score, event status and limited lineup/stat enrichment continuity
rows.action: Keep VITE_THESPORTSDB_LEAGUE_ID, VITE_THESPORTSDB_SEASON and VITE_THESPORTSDB_ENRICHMENT_LIMIT aligned with the tournament.

rows.label: Free feed CORS proxy
rows.detail: Optional VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL missing; set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 when /data-proxy/proxy is deployed on the app origin
rows.action: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs as a Worker URL, or deploy the bundled Cloudflare Pages function at /data-proxy/proxy and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.

rows.label: Lineups + injuries
rows.detail: Missing VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with server-side APIFOOTBALL_KEY
rows.action: Configure API-Football directly for diagnostics, or deploy the data proxy with server-side APIFOOTBALL_KEY to fetch fixture lineups, injuries and richer odds without exposing the key.

rows.label: Odds /盘口
rows.action: Configure API-Football odds directly, deploy the data proxy with server-side APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY, or set VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY for diagnostics.

rows.label: Paid/free backup feed
rows.action: Add Football-Data.org as a backup fixture and score route if quota allows.

rows.label: Browser seal endpoint
rows.detail: Missing VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API; set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1 when a production seal API is mounted at /seal on the app origin
rows.action: Deploy the seal API as an HTTPS /seal endpoint, or mount it behind the app origin at /seal and set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1; clients use POST /seal?async=1 and GET /jobs/:id.

rows.label: Upload token
rows.action: Require a bearer token before browser uploads can spend backend sealing resources.

rows.label: Public HTTPS app URL
rows.action: Set VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL to the deployed HTTPS app URL so proof/profile/share links are public.

rows.label: Public share image bucket
rows.action: Create a public Supabase Storage bucket for generated proof-card PNGs; default bucket is kickoff-share-cards.

rows.label: Build base path
rows.action: Keep BASE_URL aligned with the deployed path so static assets resolve correctly.

rows.label: Supabase database URL
rows.action: Set the local-only Postgres connection string used to apply supabase.schema.sql.

rows.label: Supabase service role key
rows.action: Set the local-only service role key for storage upload, target seeding and Supabase doctor checks.

rows.label: Data proxy API-Football key
rows.detail: set when deploying the data proxy so API-Football is not exposed in the browser
rows.action: Set APIFOOTBALL_KEY on the Worker/Pages runtime when VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 carries API-Football enrichment.

rows.label: Data proxy Odds API key
rows.detail: set with VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY when using The Odds API through the data proxy
rows.action: Set ODDS_API_KEY on the Worker/Pages runtime when VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY is enabled and odds reads are routed through the data proxy.

rows.label: Synapse private key
rows.action: Set SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY to a funded 0x-prefixed 32-byte Filecoin/Synapse private key.

rows.label: Server upload token
rows.action: Set FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN to a strong bearer token before exposing POST /seal.

rows.label: Persistent proof store
rows.action: Set FILECOIN_PROOF_STORE_PATH to a durable mounted file path and ensure its parent directory is writable.

rows.label: Restricted CORS origin
rows.action: Set ALLOW_ORIGIN to the deployed HTTPS app origin, not '*'.

rows.label: Same-origin seal upstream
rows.detail: not needed when VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API points directly at the seal API
rows.action: When VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1, set FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL on the Pages/Worker runtime to the trusted production /seal API.

rows.label: Cloudflare deploy auth
rows.action: Set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN plus CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID for CI, or run bunx wrangler login locally and set CLOUDFLARE_WRANGLER_LOGIN=1.

rows.label: Cloudflare Pages project
rows.action: Set the Pages project name, or keep kickoff-lock-agent when that is the deployed project.

rows.label: Synced user id
rows.action: Sync or seed a production Supabase user and leaderboard row.

rows.label: Public profile id
rows.action: Publish a profile row that public profile pages can read back.

rows.label: Prediction proof id
rows.action: Lock and sync one prediction capsule to Supabase.

rows.label: Primary mode proof id
rows.action: Create at least one synced tournament mode proof.

rows.label: All required mode proof ids
rows.action: Create bracket, parlay, Agent vs Human, upset and group path proof runs.

rows.label: Record proof CID
rows.action: Seal one prediction capsule through the production seal API.

rows.label: Record payload hash
rows.action: Copy the sealed prediction payload hash returned by the seal target report.

rows.label: Primary mode proof CID
rows.action: Seal at least one mode proof if multi-mode CIDs are not available yet.

rows.label: Primary mode payload hash
rows.action: Copy the primary sealed mode payload hash.

rows.label: All required mode CIDs
rows.action: Seal every required tournament mode proof and merge the CID list.

rows.label: All required mode payload hashes
rows.action: Merge the payload hash list from the mode seal report.

rows.label: Friend leaderboard code
rows.action: Use the synced profile friend code for the friend leaderboard scope.

rows.label: Season leaderboard key
rows.action: Use the production season key for the season leaderboard scope.

rows.label: Primary fixture id
rows.action: Scout a World Cup fixture with lineups, injuries, odds and standings.

rows.label: Fixture id list
rows.action: Merge target fixture ids returned by the data scout.

rows.label: Fixture signal matrix
rows.action: Use the scout output showing lineups, injuries, odds and standings rows for every target fixture.

rows.label: Record share image URL
rows.action: Publish the generated record PNG/JPEG/WebP at a public HTTPS URL and sync that URL into share artifacts.

rows.label: Mode share image URL
rows.action: Publish the generated mode PNG/JPEG/WebP at a public HTTPS URL and sync that URL into mode share artifacts.

rows.label: Allow failures flag
rows.action: Keep as 1 while collecting targets; remove for final strict verification.

templateText:
# Browser runtime
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL=
VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=0
APIFOOTBALL_KEY=
VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY=
ODDS_API_KEY=
VITE_ODDS_API_KEY=
VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY=
VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API=
VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=0
VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN=

# Server/service
SUPABASE_DB_URL=
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=
SYNAPSE_PRIVATE_KEY=
FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN=

# Production targets
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID=
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_PAYLOAD_HASH=
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CID=
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_PAYLOAD_HASH=
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS=
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_PAYLOAD_HASHES=
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_ID=
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS=
KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX=
